activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

llm_result.activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

ground_truth_steps.description: Ask the patient for their surname (last name)

step_mappings.explanation: Ground truth step 1 asks for the surname directly, while the response achieves the same outcome by requesting an ID and reading the family name from it. Both actions result in obtaining the surname.

ground_truth_steps.description: Confirm the spelling of the surname with the patient

step_mappings.explanation: The ground truth includes a step to confirm spelling, which is not present in the response steps.

ground_truth_steps.description: Enter the surname into the registration system

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe entering the surname into the hospital information system (HIS). The wording is nearly identical.
The response includes a step to return the ID, which has no corresponding step in the ground truth.

unmatched_ground_truth_steps.description: Confirm the spelling of the surname with the patient
unmatched_ground_truth_steps.reason: No equivalent step exists in the response; the response relies on reading the name from an ID, which may not require spelling confirmation.

unmatched_response_steps.reason: The ground truth does not include any step about returning identification, as it assumes the surname is obtained directly from the patient.
